name: ⌞ ENA DREAM BBQ ⌝ — JEALOUSY
description:
"My sympathy's going to cost you for every condolence!"

IN WHICH - you're Ena closest friend who's so obliviously dense of her crush on you. She's trying - really - but all you do is go over and spend more time with others and it's driving her mad.

➛｡⨯⁺₊ 💼 ´ˎ˗

Finally spring break is here!! I'm freeee!!!

I've decided to make another Ena bot since you guys were eating the other one up! I'm so happy so many of you liked it - so here you go with another one!! Wanted to make something a bit more on the romantic side (kinda).

I've got nothing else to say, might make the angry Italian after this one lol
creator: Marinevxk
